import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { AgencyHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <AgencyHomepage
    agencyName="Immigration and Citizenship Service"
    intro="Issues passports and manages immigration and citizenship matters."
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    primaryTasks={[
      { href: '/passport/new', label: 'Apply for a passport' },
      { href: '/passport/renew', label: 'Renew a passport' },
    ]}
    services={[{ href: '/visa', label: 'Visa services' }]}
    notices={[{ href: '/notices/1', label: 'Office closed on public holidays' }]}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

An agency's home — like a Ministry Homepage, but leads with the agency's
narrow, most-used **primary tasks** as prominent cards, since an agency
typically has fewer, more specific jobs than a ministry.

```tsx
import { AgencyHomepage } from '@ethds/templates';

<AgencyHomepage
  agencyName="Immigration and Citizenship Service"
  intro="Issues passports and manages immigration and citizenship matters."
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  primaryTasks={primaryTasks}
  services={services}
  notices={notices}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this for a narrowly-scoped executive agency's homepage — one that
performs a small number of very specific citizen-facing tasks (issuing a
document, running a service), as opposed to a ministry's broader policy
remit.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>` (the agency name); primary tasks render as cards, services
  and notices as plain lists.
- Same breadcrumb-back-to-portal and scoped-search pattern as
  [Ministry Homepage](ministry-homepage).
- `intro`, `primaryTasks`, `services`, and `notices` are all translated
  content passed in by the caller.

## Plain HTML

Structurally identical to [Ministry Homepage](ministry-homepage#plain-html) —
primary tasks render as cards (the same `.ethds-card-grid` used on the
National Portal Homepage) instead of a plain list. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/agency-homepage.md#html-example)
for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `agencyName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `intro` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `primaryTasks` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `services` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `notices` | `HomepageLinkItem[]` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<AgencyHomepageLabels>` | No |
